title: stelis ecmeles
intro: Stelis ecmeles, also known as the "dwarf orchid," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis ecmeles include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Stelis ecmeles can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create teas or tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
